title: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 26, 2016 12:29 pm Hi everyone, I put together a news round up of all of the news stories in the past couple months that may be of interest to Evangelion fans. Please give it a watch, and if you enjoy it, please subscribe for future videos. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L2vWcnESy5c

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Wed Oct 26, 2016 1:18 pm Subscribed and gave it a like too. Looking forward to seeing more

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 26, 2016 1:19 pm Thanks bro, I'm hoping to put something out every week to every two weeks. Depends on life and the scope of each video.

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Oct 26, 2016 1:41 pm I upvoted it, for what it's worth.

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by Glor » Wed Oct 26, 2016 4:44 pm Really neat things I would not bother to know otherwise. Keep going OP.

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Oct 26, 2016 7:04 pm You should really be promising more fanservice in the next episode at the end there...

[]: Re: Evangelion News Update for Fall 2016             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 26, 2016 7:20 pm Jayfive wrote: You should really be promising more fanservice in the next episode at the end there...
